courses.title: Product Manager Fellowship
curriculum: Week 1: Mapping Business Outcomes to Product Outcomes - Systems thinking, Understanding Business Models, Structured thinking with KPI trees, Actors, Actions & Entities
Week 2: Product Discovery & User Research - Impact Mapping & Opportunity sizing, User Segmentation, User Research Techniques, Journey Mapping & Personas
Week 3: Problem Framing & Ideation - Problem Framing Canvas, Ideation & Product Risks, Outcome-Opportunity-Solution tree, User Flows & Wireframing
Week 4: UX Foundations & AI Prototyping - UX Laws, Information architecture, AI assisted prototyping, Spec driven development
Week 5: Growth & Metrics - Loops & Funnels, Product Market Fit Framework, How to define metrics, North Star, AAARR, guardrail metrics
Week 6: Tech Foundations - Client server architecture, APIs, Webhooks, SDKs, System Design Concepts, AI System architecture
Week 7: LLMs & Prompt Engineering - How LLMs work, Prompt types & CoT, System/role style guides, Prompt Decay & Debugging
Week 8: RAGs, Fine Tuning & AI Automations - Embeddings & Vector Databases, Chunking & retrieval, Workflow triggers & JSON, Orchestrating LLM steps
Week 9: AI Agents & Protocols - ReAct & planner–executor, Tool selection policies, Memory & RAG grounding, AI Agent Protocols: MCP, A2A, ACP

courses.title: UI/UX Designer Fellowship
curriculum: Week 1: Business Thinking in Design - Systems thinking, Understanding Business Models, Structured thinking with KPI trees, Actors, Actions & Entities
Week 2: Product Discovery & User Research - Impact Mapping & Opportunity sizing, User Segmentation, User Research Techniques, Journey Mapping & Personas
Week 3: Problem Framing & Ideation - Problem Framing Canvas, Ideation & Product Risks, Outcome-Opportunity-Solution tree, User Flows & Wireframing
Week 4: UX Foundations & AI Prototyping - UX Laws, Information architecture, AI assisted prototyping, Spec driven development
Week 5: Intro to Visual Design - Gestalt’s Principles, Scale & Visual Hierarchy, Balance & Contrast, Visual Design elements
Week 6: Visual Design Language - Moodboarding, Colour Theory, Typography, Grids & layouts
Week 7: Understanding Design Systems - Inclusive design practices, Design Accessibility, Atomic Design systems, Design Systems Tools
Week 8: Android Material Design Deepdive - Components in Android Material Design, Material Design Toolbar, Navigation View, RecyclerView and CardView
Week 9: iOS HIG Deepdive - Navigation & Layouts, User controls, Views, Inputs & Selection, Feedback & Status
Week 10: Agentic UX & AI Design
Week 11: Building a UX Design Portfolio
Week 12: Portfolio Presentation

courses.title: Data Analyst Fellowship
curriculum: Week 0: Data and Structured Thinking - Systems thinking, Understanding Business Models, Structured thinking with KPI trees
Week 1: Introduction to Data Analytics - Understanding Types of Data, Metrics & types of analysis, Steps in exploratory data analysis, Introduction to data visualisation
Week 2: Data Preparation using Excel - Basic Functions & Shortcuts, Data Formatting Techniques, Data Cleaning Techniques, Data Protection & Error Validation
Week 3: Advanced Data Analysis using Excel - Lookup & Merging Techniques, PivotTable & Grouping, Conditional Formatting, Scenario and Sensitivity Analysis
Week 4: Business Dashboarding with Excel - Charts and Visualization Techniques, Data Visualisation Best Practices, Pivot Charts, Building interactive Dashboards
Week 5: SQL Foundation - Introduction to Database, Selection, Filtering & Ordering, Data Types, Operators and functions, Aggregate and Group By commands
Week 6: Data Manipulation with SQL - Conditional and Case Statements, Working with date/timestamps, Joins, Subqueries
Week 7: Advanced Data Manipulation with SQL - Common Table Expression (CTE), Window functions in SQL, SET operators
Week 8: Data Preparation & Exploration with Tableau - Loading Data on Tableau, Data Cleaning & Preparation Techniques, Aggregation and Logical Functions, Filters & Analytics in Tableau
Week 9: Data Visualisation with Tableau - Understanding Chart Types, Creating Charts in Tableau, LOD and Calculated Fields, Creating Dashboards & Stories
Week 10: Introduction to Python - Python Environment setup, Programming Fundamentals, Data Types, Strings, Sets, Tuples & List
Week 11: Programming in Python - Dictionaries, Conditional Statements, Loop and Control Flow, Functions
Week 12: Data Analysis using Python
Week 13: Data Visualisation using Python
Week 14: LLMs & Prompt Engineering

courses.title: Business Analyst Fellowship
curriculum: Week 1: Business Models & KPIs - Systems thinking, Understanding Business Models, Structured thinking with KPI trees, Actors, Actions & Entities
Week 2: Market Sizing & User Research - Impact Mapping & Opportunity sizing, User Segmentation, User Research Techniques, Journey Mapping & Personas
Week 3: Problem Framing & Requirements Gathering - Problem Framing Canvas, Ideation & Product Risks, Outcome-Opportunity-Solution tree, Business Requirements Document (BRD)
Week 4: Metrics & Data Instrumentation - How to define metrics, North Star, AAARR, guardrail metrics, Events & Variables, Data analysis techniques
Week 5: Introduction to Data Analytics - Understanding Types of Data, Metrics & types of analysis, Steps in exploratory data analysis, Introduction to data visualisation
Week 6: Data Preparation using Excel - Basic Functions & Shortcuts, Data Formatting Techniques, Data Cleaning Techniques, Data Protection & Error Validation
Week 7: Advanced Data Analysis using Excel - Lookup & Merging Techniques, PivotTable & Grouping, Conditional Formatting, Scenario and Sensitivity Analysis
Week 8: SQL Foundation - Introduction to Database, Selection, Filtering & Ordering, Data Types, Operators and functions, Aggregate and Group By commands
Week 9: Data Manipulation with SQL - Conditional and Case Statements, Working with date/timestamps, Joins, Subqueries
Week 10: Advanced Data Manipulation with SQL - Common Table Expression (CTE), Window functions in SQL, SET operators
Week 11: Introduction to Python
Week 12: Programming in Python
Week 13: Data Analysis using Python
Week 14: AI for Business Analysts

courses.title: Applied Generative AI Bootcamp
curriculum: Week 1: AI System Design - APIs, Webhooks, SDKs, System Design Principles, AI system architecture, Probabilistic vs deterministic design
Week 2: LLMs & Prompt Engineering - How LLMs work, Prompt types & CoT, System/role style guides, Debugging prompt failures
Week 3: RAGs & AI Workflow Automation - Embeddings & vector databases, Chunking & retrieval, Workflow triggers & JSON, Orchestrating LLM steps
Week 4: AI Agents & Protocols - ReAct & planner–executor, Tool selection policies, Memory & RAG grounding, MCP basics & scope
Week 5: AI Output Evaluation - Failure modes & bias, Eval rubrics & metrics, Golden sets & A/B tests, LLM-as-judge limits
Week 6: Building Voice Agents - Voice UX & latency, STT→LLM→TTS loop, Privacy, consent, fallback, Speech to Speech models
Week 7: Advanced AI Prototyping - Principles of vibe coding, Choosing the right tool, UI to full-stack prototype, Cost & latency logging
Week 8: AI Product Strategy - Identifying AI use cases, Understanding trade-offs, AI Growth Metrics, AI Virality & Distribution Loops
Week 9 & 10: Capstone Project & Demo Day - Group Demos (upto 3 members), Combines automation, agent design, RAG, and output evaluation, Prepare for Demo Day presentation

terminology.meaning: A cohort at NextLeap refers to a specific batch of students starting the fellowship together. For example, 'Cohort 48' is the 48th iteration of the program.
terminology.context: The fact that Cohort 48 is starting indicates that 47 batches have successfully been launched or completed previously.

terminology.meaning: PM stands for Product Manager Fellowship.
terminology.context: NextLeap offers a 16-week Product Manager Fellowship.

terminology.meaning: UX or UI/UX refers to the UI/UX Designer Fellowship.
terminology.context: The UI/UX Designer Fellowship is a 4-month program.

terminology.meaning: DA stands for Data Analyst Fellowship.
terminology.context: The Data Analyst Fellowship is a 16-week program.

terminology.meaning: BA stands for Business Analyst Fellowship.
terminology.context: The Business Analyst Fellowship is an 18-week program.

terminology.meaning: GenAI or AI refers to the Applied Generative AI Bootcamp.
terminology.context: The Applied Generative AI Bootcamp is a 10-week intensive course.
